title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS backed by $85M+ and trusted by The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer who builds flows, dashboards, and data models while collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri is a perfect match: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience exceeds the 7+ requirement, strong Salesforce/RevOps background aligns with core needs, and proven scaling expertise fits the $30M+ ARR mandate. The Tel Aviv HQ collaboration is ideal given his local presence and familiarity.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS revenue operations directly mirrors what the CRO is building post-$85M funding. With your Salesforce mastery and track record taking companies through hypergrowth phases, you'd be uniquely positioned to establish the revenue infrastructure that powers their next growth curve, especially with the Tel Aviv HQ synergy built in.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations

Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), Salesforce proficiency, and familiarity with tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan.
score_reason: Excellent match for Omri's RevOps expertise and B2B SaaS background. Territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and Salesforce proficiency directly align with core responsibilities, and remote role eliminates location constraints.
ai_opener: Omri here – I've spent 15+ years scaling revenue operations in B2B SaaS, with deep experience in territory modeling, pipeline forecasting, and CRM optimization that directly maps to your RevOps Manager role. Having led GTM efficiency initiatives across multiple growth stages, I'm particularly excited about Gong's focus on designing scalable territory compositions and the analytical rigor this demands.
